title: schoenus niveus
intro: Schoenus niveus, also known as the White Club-rush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sedge family. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Schoenus niveus include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
